rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Educ. Code §21.104, which governs discharge and suspension of teachers under probationary contracts. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 21.104. DISCHARGE DURING YEAR OR SUSPENSION WITHOUT PAY UNDER PROBATIONARY CONTRACT.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict identified.
